rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description 'Arrearagia pro 2do Die Novr: 1825' as it most accurately reflects the script, especially '2do' (superscript 'o') and 'Die'. All extractors agreed on no amounts and row type.
Selected gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini for description 'Money Rents, fixed.' as visual inspection confirms 'fixed.', not 'paid.'. All extractors agreed on no amounts and row type.

Visual inspection shows 'Gwinear' (not 'Gwmear') and '1/2 year' (literal script representation) for description. Amounts are clearly 90 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence, aligning with gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Overriding gemini-flash's 9 pounds.

Visual inspection shows 'Menhenriot. ... 1. Yr.' for description (from gemini-flash, capturing full text). Amounts are clearly 20 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence, aligning with gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Overriding gemini-flash's 2 pounds.
Visual inspection confirms 'Bampton Tenement. 3 Yrs' (gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini) is correct over claude-haiku's 'Rampleton Virement'. All extractors agreed on amounts.
Visual inspection confirms 'Montacute - Do - 21. Yrs' (gemini-flash) is correct. Claude-haiku's 'Montaute. 2d. 2½ yrs' is incorrect. All extractors agreed on amounts.
Visual inspection confirms 'Lad Lane Norris - 1. Yr.' (gemini-flash) is most accurate, particularly 'Yr.' and the dash. All extractors agreed on amounts.

All extractors agreed on description, amounts, and row type. Consensus value used.
